instruction: Among these icons (document, folder, bookmark, trash, key), recolor ONLY the bookmark orange (#f97316). All others must stay #222.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 336 80" width="336" height="80">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="336" height="80" fill="white" />
  <g id="document" data-source="heroicons/outline/document.svg" transform="translate(16, 16) scale(2)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M19.5 14.25v-2.625a3.375 3.375 0 0 0-3.375-3.375h-1.5A1.125 1.125 0 0 1 13.5 7.125v-1.5a3.375 3.375 0 0 0-3.375-3.375H8.25m2.25 0H5.625c-.621 0-1.125.504-1.125 1.125v17.25c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125h12.75c.621 0 1.125-.504 1.125-1.125V11.25a9 9 0 0 0-9-9Z"/></g>
  <g id="folder" data-source="heroicons/outline/folder.svg" transform="translate(80, 16) scale(2)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M2.25 12.75V12A2.25 2.25 0 0 1 4.5 9.75h15A2.25 2.25 0 0 1 21.75 12v.75m-8.69-6.44-2.12-2.12a1.5 1.5 0 0 0-1.061-.44H4.5A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 2.25 6v12a2.25 2.25 0 0 0 2.25 2.25h15A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 21.75 18V9a2.25 2.25 0 0 0-2.25-2.25h-5.379a1.5 1.5 0 0 1-1.06-.44Z"/></g>
  <g id="bookmark" data-source="heroicons/outline/bookmark.svg" transform="translate(144, 16) scale(2)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M17.593 3.322c1.1.128 1.907 1.077 1.907 2.185V21L12 17.25 4.5 21V5.507c0-1.108.806-2.057 1.907-2.185a48.507 48.507 0 0 1 11.186 0Z"/></g>
  <g id="trash" data-source="heroicons/outline/trash.svg" transform="translate(208, 16) scale(2)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="m14.74 9-.346 9m-4.788 0L9.26 9m9.968-3.21c.342.052.682.107 1.022.166m-1.022-.165L18.16 19.673a2.25 2.25 0 0 1-2.244 2.077H8.084a2.25 2.25 0 0 1-2.244-2.077L4.772 5.79m14.456 0a48.108 48.108 0 0 0-3.478-.397m-12 .562c.34-.059.68-.114 1.022-.165m0 0a48.11 48.11 0 0 1 3.478-.397m7.5 0v-.916c0-1.18-.91-2.164-2.09-2.201a51.964 51.964 0 0 0-3.32 0c-1.18.037-2.09 1.022-2.09 2.201v.916m7.5 0a48.667 48.667 0 0 0-7.5 0"/></g>
  <g id="key" data-source="heroicons/outline/key.svg" transform="translate(272, 16) scale(2)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M15.75 5.25a3 3 0 0 1 3 3m3 0a6 6 0 0 1-7.029 5.912c-.563-.097-1.159.026-1.563.43L10.5 17.25H8.25v2.25H6v2.25H2.25v-2.818c0-.597.237-1.17.659-1.591l6.499-6.499c.404-.404.527-1 .43-1.563A6 6 0 1 1 21.75 8.25Z"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
